instruction: Explain how the vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker.
input: A vulnerability has been found in code-projects Chat System 1.0 and classified as critical. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /admin/deleteroom.php. The manipulation of the argument id leads to sql injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
output: An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending crafted requests with malicious SQL code in the 'id' parameter to the /admin/deleteroom.php endpoint, allowing SQL command execution on the database.
